review_body_text: Job is easy to finish but the task volume is high. All job need to be done before go home. Enjoy work there because no one will always talk to you. It's good for an introvert like me

U will get a 1 months training but not all things the trainer will teach u. After that u need to be independent. Customer force u to much. Always coming late work (need to follow up for some customers enquiry) basically not ot. Need to email to go toilet (this is funny). After all not worth to work here even salary is high.

review_title: Productive and glad ti learn new experience
review_body_text: Very profesional and the facilities super duper best and the teams are very welcome when you enter into their department. Kindly, they are very politely and love to help in teams.
lingkungan kerja nyaman, parkir gratis , temat ibadah nyaman gak ada kantin
cons_text: makan siang beli sendiri, istrahat cepet bnget di atur

review_body_text: - no worklife balance, going back late, eventhough you have kids, management don't care at all. - lack moral support from management - management dont consider to provide work from home to staff eventhough rotation for wfh.
cons_text: - stressful - no worklife balance - long working hours

review_title: No work life balance and poor management
review_body_text: Junior has to handle huge workload and expected to OT very late. Self accountability is very important since seniors won't shade you. Training is provided but it's seems more work than training in reality, you must search for answers yourself most of the time.

review_title: Productive and fun place for intern
review_body_text: The colleagues very nice and helpful. Sometimes got free items like lipstick for celebrating valentine day or free lunch(very often) . My boss is a strict person but very kind and care about his team. Got one day to leave early(every friday for TFO dept)- now i dont know.
pros_text: Nice place to start and buid career
cons_text: Have to keep track the targeted work.

review_body_text: Good culture, need improvement on training. Staff benefit ok but some time lack of flexibility as the compliance can be very strict. System not too advance

review_title: Productive and fun enviroment stressful during end of the month closing
review_body_text: Mostly i call clients and check on their payment and also will follow up on due payment. Prepare reports for end month closing Slightly stressfull during end of the month
pros_text: Weekly rewards and coupons voucher given

review_body_text: Lots of experience even short period of working. Hands on work and guided. Casual business outfit. Friendly working environment Can be stressful work as you have to attend to call and can be very overwhelming at times.

This company gives a good amount of perks and moderate pay. You have to do more work than what's under your job description though. It's expected that you multitask and accept ad hoc assignements here. you
job_title: AML Risk & Compliance – Control Monitoring & Reporting
pros_text: Good hospitalisation benefits, holiday bungalows, high annual leave count

review_body_text: This is the nicest bosses I've ever met, their benefits also very good. However, their loan processing is slow which will takes up to months. Overall, they are not bad.

The bank is very compliant driven with close monitoring from the central bank - BNM and MAS . The staff are required to follow strict SOP and SLA . Staff are also required to take yearly regulatory compulsory training
job_title: Assistant Vice President, Banking Fraud Specialist

review_title: Productive with some relaxing exercise and enjoyable activity.
review_body_text: sometimes, the department had to handle with stressful of working time and they might need some relaxing exercise that can make them feel relax and more calm with the good environment. So, they need to enhanced their culture to be more positive with around.

review_title: Fast paced and KPI oriented environment
review_body_text: Be prepared to be questioned if you're not able to achieve your KPI within probation period. I was based in collections so basically, the job was monotonous as we need to liaise with customers daily via phone calls.
pros_text: Excellent benefits by the bank & bonus

review_body_text: You should be hardworking. They expect you to stay more than the working hours, Contractors have no overtime pay and offset is sometimes not used due to busy schedule.

review_title: Productive and fun workplace with collegus
review_body_text: -Challaging, fast path working environment -need to be fast learners -need more focus in job -good nenefots & compesations to staff -working in group or individual

Ocbc Bank offers their employee with great benefit and focusing on individual / employee growth. Apart from that, their work culture also focusing on teamwork which is good in keeping you motivated and less stressful.
If you are good at decorating and handling events, you might have a future lol. If you like drinking coffee or milo, it's free. If you like work life balance....
I have been exposed to a work environment and job scope of a banking industry. I have learn a lot and the staff all are very helpful. A good place to start a career.
